estimand_definitions.A_natural_replan: retained first-2 actions forced, reset-belief MPC replans weeks 3-8 on the reached state
estimand_definitions.C_frozen_splice: retained prefix + reset-trajectory weeks 3-8 (the burn's estimand)

action_vs_belief.note: A==B calendars is ACTION-equivalence, not belief-equivalence: priors differ in n_initial_belief_differs pairs but only change the first two actions in n_first2_action_changed of them.
